text:
There once was a boy named Jack. Jack lived an ordinary life. He went to boring schools. He watched television too much.

One day, Jack fell into an extensive hole beneath his bed. It took months to dig him out. When he was finally free, he looked into the darkness. A rat gnashed its teeth at him.

That night, Jack didnONDTGO.

He went spelUNKING.

You never talk about those old times. What do you usually do?

I read books. What do youLike?

Oh, I don’t know many. Just a lot of classics.

One day you read something about a boy who spelOUNDED into a castle.

Maybe some fantasy. I love fantasizes.

Hmm. Anything interesting?

Once, I dreamed I was a swBAT.

Wow. Was awesome?

Not really.

Just normal dreams.

That’s...actually nice.

Oh... I guess I do kind of like things.

Maybe you’d LIKE a rat?<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
